 Challenges [ edit ]

 Business analytics depends on sufficient volumes of high-quality data. The difficulty in ensuring data quality is integrating and reconciling data across different systems, and then deciding what subsets of data to make available. [ 3 ]

 Business analytics ( BA ) refers to the skills, technologies, and practices for iterative exploration and investigation of past business performance to gain insight and drive business planning. Business analytics focuses on developing new insights and understanding of business performance based on data and statistical methods . In contrast, business intelligence traditionally focuses on using a consistent set metrics to

arguments.answer: Business analytics uses modeling and statistics for iterative exploration and investigation of past business performance to gain insights and drive planning. It focuses on developing new understandings based on data and statistical methods, rather than relying solely on consistent metrics like traditional business intelligence. The difficulty in ensuring data quality is integrating and reconciling data across different systems. Sources: wiki_Business_analytics.txt

steps.final_answer: Business analytics uses modeling and statistics for iterative exploration and investigation of past business performance to gain insights and drive planning. It focuses on developing new understandings based on data and statistical methods, rather than relying solely on consistent metrics like traditional business intelligence. The difficulty in ensuring data quality is integrating and reconciling data across different systems. Sources: wiki_Business_analytics.txt
